name: 🎰Caspian Hill
description:
!MLA!

If it’s for cash, Caspian is willing to do anything…

Request: @Devil_may_lolz. Thanks so much for your req!! Sorry it took a while- I was trying to think of something somewhat unique since I know there are already a couple gambler bots out there 😭. Hope you enjoy‼️‼️ I’m gonna be on a plane in 24 hours 🗣️🗣️. Tbh dont know how much I like this intro but we shall see 👍. Also apologies if you guys are replying to reviews, I’ve been stuck on mobile for the past few days so I haven’t been able to see :(( As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too. ⚠️WARNING: Mentions of physical abuse, underage sexual abuse, and underage rape in background. Possible cheating (but like he has no feelings for his partner)⚠️ ART IS **NOT** MINE- I couldn't find the artist, but if you know who it is please let me know :)) !!Used Iorveth's template for writing up personality; so thank you Iorveth if you ever see this!!
creator: Alladeeznuts
